title: IC 1-1-1-2 - Repeal of prior laws; provisions not repealed
text:
IC 1-1-1-2
Repeal of prior laws; provisions not repealed
Sec. 2. All acts enacted before the 1976 regular session of the Indiana general assembly
are repealed, except that this repeal does not include the following:
(1) The following acts of incorporation enacted before the 36th session of the general
assembly, and their amendments, whether those amendments were enacted before,
during, or after the 36th session:
Acts 1807, c.75, s.1-2.
Acts 1810, c.17, s.1-9.
1824 Revised Statutes, c.64, s.5-6.
Acts 1832, c.133, s.1.
